title: mserver5 restart aborts/segfaults after dropping column with constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL OR age < 0;
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN age;
key_bug_features: Dropping column with constraint causes server restart failure
